description: MITRE ATT&CK - Lateral Movement: PostgreSQL FDW and remote connectivity indicators.

rules.title: PostgreSQL CREATE SERVER for risky FDW
rules.message: CREATE SERVER with a foreign data wrapper can introduce remote connectivity, lateral movement or exfiltration paths.
rules.recommendation: Create FDW servers only through controlled DBA/security processes and review host, wrapper and options.

rules.title: PostgreSQL CREATE USER MAPPING
rules.message: CREATE USER MAPPING can bind local users to remote FDW identities and enable lateral movement or exfiltration.
rules.recommendation: Manage user mappings through controlled DBA/security processes and avoid embedding remote identity data in deployment scripts.

rules.title: PostgreSQL dblink call
rules.message: dblink/dblink_connect/dblink_exec can create outgoing database connections or execute remote SQL.
rules.recommendation: Review remote target, credentials and need for dblink; prefer controlled integration paths.
